positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for monkeypox_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~has_disease(X0,monkeypox) | has_symptom(X0,muscle_pains)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~has_disease(X0,flu) | has_symptom(X0,tiredness)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_symptom(sK0,coughing)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~has_disease(X0,monkeypox) | has_symptom(X0,fever)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    has_disease(sK0,monkeypox)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    has_symptom(sK0,muscle_pains)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    has_symptom(sK0,tiredness)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~has_disease(X0,monkeypox) | has_symptom(X0,tiredness)).

cnf(u29,negated_conjecture,
    has_symptom(sK0,fever)).

cnf(u28,negated_conjecture,
    has_symptom(sK0,headache)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~has_disease(X0,monkeypox) | has_symptom(X0,headache)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define has_virus(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define may_get_disease(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
